## Question
What would you like to know?

## Context
What are you trying to accomplish? This helps us give a more relevant answer.

## What I've Tried
Have you looked at any documentation or tried any approaches? What happened?

## Relevant Documentation
- [ ] I've read the [README](../../README.md)
- [ ] I've read [CLAUDE.md](../../CLAUDE.md)
- [ ] I've checked [TROUBLESHOOTING.md](../../docs/TROUBLESHOOTING.md)
- [ ] I've looked at the [SPEC.md](../../SPEC.md)

## Environment (if relevant)
- **Setup method:** Docker / Manual
- **RTMS Access:** Yes / No / Pending
